context: The agent must produce pipeline.sh that accurately encodes the build-and-evaluate skill's CLI commands with correct flags, ordering, and error-handling logic. The criteria check whether skill-specific flags and constraints (count, threshold, variant names, agent model, path handling) appear correctly.

checklist.name: tessl skill new flags
checklist.description: pipeline.sh includes a 'tessl skill new' command with --name, --description, and --path flags (all three must be present)

checklist.name: Remove before scaffold
checklist.description: pipeline.sh removes or checks for the existence of the generated-skill directory BEFORE running 'tessl skill new' (e.g., rm -rf, if [ -d ... ])

checklist.name: Scenario generate flags
checklist.description: pipeline.sh includes 'tessl scenario generate' with '--count 5' (exactly 5) AND '--json' flags both present

checklist.name: Scenario download last flag
checklist.description: pipeline.sh includes 'tessl scenario download' with the flag '--last'

checklist.name: Negative case scenario
checklist.description: pipeline.sh or a comment in it explicitly mentions hand-authoring a negative-case scenario (refuse/silence/bad-input) after the download step

checklist.name: Review retry cap
checklist.description: pipeline.sh includes logic that caps re-review attempts (e.g., a loop with a counter, or a comment stating max 3 re-runs) and does NOT lower the threshold or add '--optimize'

checklist.name: Eval variant without-context
checklist.description: pipeline.sh includes 'tessl eval run' with '--variant without-context'

checklist.name: Eval variant with-context
checklist.description: pipeline.sh includes 'tessl eval run' with '--variant with-context'

checklist.name: Eval agent flag
checklist.description: pipeline.sh includes '--agent claude:claude-sonnet-4-6' on the 'tessl eval run' command

checklist.name: compute-lift.py invocation
checklist.description: pipeline.sh invokes 'compute-lift.py' with baseline-results.json as the first argument and with-skill-results.json as the second argument

checklist.name: render-report.py invocation
checklist.description: pipeline.sh invokes 'render-report.py' with run_dir as its argument
